import React, { useState } from "react"; export default function PaymentPage() { const [cardNumber, setCardNumber] = useState(""); const [name, setName] = useState(""); const [expiry, setExpiry] = useState(""); const [cvv, setCvv] = useState(""); // ตัวอย่าง order summary const orderSummary = [ { name: "Be Nice Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower", qty: 1, price: 315.0, img: "/images/shower1.png", // เปลี่ยน path ตามรูปจริง }, { name: "Be Nice Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower", qty: 2, price: 657.0, img: "/images/shower2.png", }, ]; const subtotal = orderSummary.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.price * item.qty, 0); return (
{/* Step Progress */}
Login
Delivery
Payment
{/* Payment Form */}

Payment Details

setCardNumber(e.target.value)} placeholder="1234 5678 9012 3456" className="w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded" />
setName(e.target.value)} placeholder="Your Name" className="w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded" />
setExpiry(e.target.value)} placeholder="MM/YY" className="w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded" />
setCvv(e.target.value)} placeholder="123" className="w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded" />
{/* Order Summary */}

Summary Order

{orderSummary.map((item, index) => (

{item.name}

{item.category}

Qty: {item.qty}

${item.price}

))}
Subtotal ${subtotal}
Delivery Free
Total ${subtotal}
); }
